name: Feature request

title: "[Feature]: "

## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed approach

Describe the change you want to see.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives or workarounds you tried.

## Additional context

Add links, screenshots, or examples that would help review the request.
